evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(4000);if(!window.MembreteSystem)return{err:'no MembreteSystem'};try{MembreteSystem.abrirMenuProductoCard({codigoBarra:'7501234567890',descripcion:'GALLETA SODA DERIVADA 250 GR',precio:5.5,skuBase:'SKU-TEST',idProducto:'SKU-TEST',codigoProductoBase:'BASE-1',adhSugerido:12});}catch(e){return{err:'abrir: '+e.message};}await w(1400);const me=document.getElementById('msMeQty'),wh=document.getElementById('msWhQty'),adh=document.getElementById('msAdhQty');const overlay=document.getElementById('msMenuOverlay');const opts=overlay?overlay.querySelectorAll('.ms-opt3').length:0;const ov=[...(overlay?overlay.querySelectorAll('*'):[])].filter(el=>{const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>0&&r.right>innerWidth+2;}).length;return{opts,meQty:me?me.value:null,whQty:wh?wh.value:null,adhQty:adh?adh.value:null,tresSteppers:!!(me&&wh&&adh),modalOverflow:overlay?document.documentElement.scrollWidth>innerWidth+1:null,elemsOffscreen:ov};})()
